---
name: Agent Fiscal Autonomy Audit Request
about: Request the $99 no-secret readiness audit after a public snapshot or qualified scope question
title: "Audit request: <capability or seller name>"
labels: audit-request
---

## Seller role

Who owns this capability and who can approve the readiness sprint/payment?

Acceptable evidence: role/title/company context. Do not include private IDs or credentials.

## Capability surface

What API endpoint, MCP tool, dataset, SaaS workflow, content resource, wallet rail, or credit surface should be reviewed?

Acceptable evidence: public docs/repo/link or redacted description.

## Monetization state

How is it monetized now, or how is it intended to be monetized?

Acceptable evidence: pricing page, quota model, planned price, subscription, pay-per-call, or credit model.

## Access control

How is access controlled?

Acceptable evidence: API key, OAuth, MCP auth, allowlist, manual approval, or policy description. Do not share secrets.

## Approval and limit policy

Who or what approves agent access, and what limit/cap applies?

Acceptable evidence: policy summary, cap, threshold, approval flow, budget rule, or governance rule.

## Receipt or audit trail

What evidence exists for call, charge, settlement, result, and traceability?

Acceptable evidence: redacted receipt/log description, public tx hash if already public-safe, audit dashboard description, or ledger summary.

## Revocation and next threshold

How can access be revoked/reduced, and what would justify safe expansion?

Acceptable evidence: revocation path, kill switch, key rotation, cap reduction, next threshold, or rollback procedure.

## Safety-boundary acceptance

- [ ] I will not share seed phrases, private keys, cookies, sessions, OAuth tokens, API keys, auth headers, or raw credentials.
- [ ] I will not share unredacted customer PII or confidential logs unless separately approved and redacted.
- [ ] I understand this is a readiness audit, not financial/legal/tax/investment/compliance advice.
- [ ] I understand there is no guaranteed revenue, security, compliance, or incident prevention.
- [ ] I understand payment instructions are only issued after qualification and explicit scope acceptance.

## Invoice gate

Payment route remains closed until all seven fields are complete, non-secret, in scope, and explicitly accepted for a fixed audit.
